creator: Kirsten Korosec
title: (No AI) Anthropic’s landmark $1.5B copyright settlement is approved
dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
content: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.
contentSnippet: The final approval settles one case, but it doesn't resolve the broader issue of using copyrighted works to train AI models.

creator: Julie Bort
title: (No AI) Trump’s latest AI czar has already resigned
dc:creator: Julie Bort
content: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.
contentSnippet: The director role for the Center for AI Standards and Innovation (CAISI) has become a revolving door since David Sacks left his position as czar.

title: (No AI) Here are the 30,000 songs Sony is suing Udio’s AI music generator over
author: Emma Roth
content:
![A fractured image of a person speaking into a microphone.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2025/02/STK467_AI_MUSIC_CVirginia_A.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of [more than 30,000](https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/28500966-sony-v-udio-songs/) of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's _Hound Dog_ to Beyoncé's _Say My Name_, and Harry Styles' _As It Was_. The [lawsuit, filed in a New York court](https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/28500970-sony-v-udio-july-2026/) on Monday, claims that this list represents "only a small portion of Plaintiffs' works that Udio infringed," as [reported earlier by _Music Business Worldwide_.](https://www.musicbusinessworldwide.com/sony-music-files-new-lawsuit-against-ai-platform-udio-asserting-over-30000-sound-recordings-a-judge-barred-it-from-adding-to-its-original-case/)

In 2024, Sony, along with Universal Music Group and Warner Records, [filed a lawsuit against Udio](https://www.theverge.com/2024/6/24/24184710/riaa-ai-lawsuit-suno-udio-copyright-umg-sony-warner) and the AI music-maker Suno. After gaining access to Udio's training data through discovery, Sony cla …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/tech/968375/sony-udio-lawsuit-songs-ai-copyright)
contentSnippet:
Sony Music Entertainment has filed another lawsuit against Udio, accusing the AI music generator of infringing the copyright of more than 30,000 of its songs, ranging from Elvis Presley's Hound Dog to Beyoncé's Say My Name, and Harry Styles' As It Was. The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this list represents "only a small portion of Plaintiffs' works that Udio infringed," as reported earlier by Music Business Worldwide.
In 2024, Sony, along with Universal Music Group and Warner Records, filed a lawsuit against Udio and the AI music-maker Suno. After gaining access to Udio's training data through discovery, Sony cla …
Read the full story at The Verge.

The lawsuit, filed in a New York court on Monday, claims that this […]

title: (No AI) SpaceX in your index fund, explained
author: Elizabeth Lopatto
content:
![Elon Musk with zeros and money falling from the sky.](https://platform.theverge.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/2/2026/06/STKE012_SPACEX_IPO_2026_D.jpg?quality=90&strip=all&crop=0,0,100,100)

AUUUUUGH | Image: Cath Virginia / The Verge, Getty Images

Index funds are touted as one of the safest ways to invest. Rather than picking and choosing individual stocks, index funds let you bet on the market as a whole. So what happens when a company like SpaceX - a [giant gamble](https://www.theguardian.com/science/2026/jun/19/spacex-retirement-savings-elon-musk), and, in my opinion, [terribly overpriced](https://www.theverge.com/ai-artificial-intelligence/940001/elon-musk-spacex-ipo-ai) - is fast-tracked into the Nasdaq-100? Does it suddenly threaten the stability of index funds based on the Nasdaq-100? [Can a $1.77 trillion IPO](https://www.nbcnews.com/business/business-news/spacex-ipo-trading-price-rcna349225) crater the retirement funds of regular people who would ordinarily have no interest in investing in Elon Musk's meme stock?

The answer has less to do with SpaceX and more to do with index funds - how they work, their history, and why they've …

[Read the full story at The Verge.](https://www.theverge.com/business/968257/spacex-in-your-index-fund-explained)

title: (No AI) Safety and alignment in an era of long-horizon models
content: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.
contentSnippet: OpenAI shares lessons from deploying long-running AI models, highlighting new safety risks, observed failures, and improved safeguards through iterative deployment.

title: (No AI) A scorecard for the AI age
content: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.
contentSnippet: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

title: (No AI) Our approach to bioresilience
content: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.
contentSnippet: Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs are sharing our joint approach to bioresilience and AI models.

title: (No AI) Empowering India’s next generation of innovators with ATL Saathi
content: Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.
contentSnippet: Google and AIM launched ATL Saathi, a Gemini-powered AI tool empowering Indian educators in robotics labs.

creator: Vittoria Elliott
title: (No AI) The Army Is Burning Through Its AI Tokens
dc:creator: Vittoria Elliott
content: Members of the Army received an email informing them that they were rapidly depleting their AI tokens, and needed to limit use.
contentSnippet: Members of the Army received an email informing them that they were rapidly depleting their AI tokens, and needed to limit use.

creator: Ej Dickson
title: (No AI) Etsy Is In Its Flop Era, and Sellers Are Fleeing
dc:creator: Ej Dickson
content: Once a quirky bastion of amateur vulva jewelry and pet portraits, Etsy is now deluged with mass-produced goods and AI knockoffs. Some customers don’t seem to mind.
contentSnippet: Once a quirky bastion of amateur vulva jewelry and pet portraits, Etsy is now deluged with mass-produced goods and AI knockoffs. Some customers don’t seem to mind.
